brief_justification: Arrives at exact correct answer (A) with accurate characterization of each level; only states what each explanation does without exploring why abstraction hierarchies work this way or second-order implications; no reflection on reasoning method or potential missteps; does not cross-check ordering or test boundary cases like whether E2 could plausibly be more abstract than E3; presents conclusion as self-evident with no uncertainty acknowledgment or confidence qualification; considers only the chosen ordering with no evaluation of competing rankings; maps each explanation to its abstraction level clearly enough for reproduction, though derivations are brief summaries rather than full derivations
